description: Renovate config for the OpenCHAMI integration-sandbox.
Watches the pinned image tags in images/*.env and opens a PR
whenever an OpenCHAMI service publishes a new GitHub Release.
Each PR's CI run exercises `make ci` against the bumped tag.
csm-rie) are intentionally left out of the watch list — they
don't follow OpenCHAMI's release cadence and the daily `edge`
drift on them. Add specific third-party images to a new
customManager block if you want PRs for them too.

customManagers.description: Bump OpenCHAMI service image tags in images/*.env
Bump any other explicitly-annotated image tags in images/*.env

packageRules.description: Group all OpenCHAMI service bumps into one PR per release wave so the sandbox tests them together — the way they actually deploy.
Don't chase pre-release tags (pr-*, rc.*, alpha, beta). Renovate's default would otherwise open noisy PRs for every PR build pushed to ghcr.
Auto-merge sandbox-fixture and tooling-only PRs that pass CI. Service bumps stay manual — they're the whole point of the sandbox: a human should look at the PR diff.
